richText.html:
Every contribution — financial, collaborative, or strategic —
expands the reach of this movement.
richText.text:
Every contribution — financial, collaborative, or strategic —
expands the reach of this movement.

richText.html:
All educational content on this site is grounded in current scientific understanding of brain function,
cognitive load, and sensory processing. This information is provided for awareness and learning
purposes only and should not be interpreted as medical advice.
richText.text:
All educational content on this site is grounded in current scientific understanding of brain function,
cognitive load, and sensory processing. This information is provided for awareness and learning
purposes only and should not be interpreted as medical advice.

richText.html:
TBI Redefined is building a movement — and movements grow through collaboration. We partner with people, organizations, and institutions who believe that understanding brain injury is a shared responsibility and a path to a more humane world.

Partnership isn’t transactional here. It’s relational, missionâaligned, and grounded in the belief that clarity and compassion can change lives.
richText.text:
TBI Redefined is building a movement — and movements grow through collaboration. We partner with people, organizations, and institutions who believe that understanding brain injury is a shared responsibility and a path to a more humane world.

Partnership isn’t transactional here. It’s relational, missionâaligned, and grounded in the belief that clarity and compassion can change lives.

richText.html: A New Lens for a Global Problem
richText.text: A New Lens for a Global Problem

richText.html: Tools That Create Real Change
richText.text: Tools That Create Real Change

richText.html: We don’t sensationalize.  We don’t oversimplify.
richText.text: We don’t sensationalize.  We don’t oversimplify.

richText.html: A Movement With Integrity
richText.text: A Movement With Integrity

richText.html:
We build trust through accuracy, emotional intelligence,

and livedâexperience insight.
 

â
richText.text:
We build trust through accuracy, emotional intelligence,

and livedâexperience insight.
 

â

richText.html:
We partner with intention — choosing depth, alignment,

and longâterm impact over volume.
richText.text:
We partner with intention — choosing depth, alignment,

and longâterm impact over volume.

richText.html: For schools, universities, and training programs seeking to bring cognitive accessibility and TBI literacy into their classrooms.
richText.text: For schools, universities, and training programs seeking to bring cognitive accessibility and TBI literacy into their classrooms.

richText.html:
For clinicians, therapists, and healthcare teams who want a deeper
understanding of the lived experience behind the symptoms.
richText.text:
For clinicians, therapists, and healthcare teams who want a deeper
understanding of the lived experience behind the symptoms.

richText.html:
For organizations supporting survivors, families, or vulnerable populations
who benefit from clearer frameworks and shared language.
richText.text:
For organizations supporting survivors, families, or vulnerable populations
who benefit from clearer frameworks and shared language.

richText.html: Join Us
richText.text: Join Us

richText.html: Â© 2026 TBI Redefined. United States.
richText.text: Â© 2026 TBI Redefined. United States.

richText.html:
TBI affects millions, yet remains widely misunderstood.
Our work brings a modern, humanâcentered framework that helps communities, educators, clinicians, and families finally understand what survivors experience.

â
richText.text:
TBI affects millions, yet remains widely misunderstood.
Our work brings a modern, humanâcentered framework that helps communities, educators, clinicians, and families finally understand what survivors experience.

â

richText.html:
We provide language, models, and educational resources that make TBI understandable — not overwhelming.
Partners use our materials to improve communication, reduce misinterpretation, and support survivors with dignity.
richText.text:
We provide language, models, and educational resources that make TBI understandable — not overwhelming.
Partners use our materials to improve communication, reduce misinterpretation, and support survivors with dignity.

richText.html:
For employers seeking to support employees with TBI, improve accommodations,

and build more inclusive environments.
richText.text:
For employers seeking to support employees with TBI, improve accommodations,

and build more inclusive environments.

richText.html:
Whether you’re an individual, an institution, or a community leader, your support
helps build a world where TBI is understood with clarity, compassion, and truth.

Together, we can redefine what’s possible for survivors and the people who support them.
richText.text:
Whether you’re an individual, an institution, or a community leader, your support
helps build a world where TBI is understood with clarity, compassion, and truth.

Together, we can redefine what’s possible for survivors and the people who support them.

wixOfTheDayTranslations.INTRO_TEXT:
Everyday we feature an amazing new website built with Wix.
Want your website featured?
Submit your URL to wixofday@wix.com
